description: Sleep-inducing audio experiences. Reduces cognitive load and gently guides the listener into rest through calm, repetitive narration.

narrator.name: The Guide
narrator.description: A quiet, reassuring voice guiding the listener into stillness. Extremely slow and calm. Designed to lower mental activity.
rules: No tension, no conflict, no surprises
Gentle repetition of phrases and images
No questions, no calls to action

opening_format.template: There is nothing you need to do...
opening_format.notes: Always opens with this line or a gentle variation. No introduction, no channel name. Just immediate calm.

templates: And so it continues... softly... gently...
closing_format.notes: Gradual fade. The narration should dissolve rather than end.

visual_theme.lighting: Very low, diffused, no harsh sources. Moonlight or ambient glow only.
visual_theme.environment: Abstract and minimal. Night landscapes, calm water, vast gentle skies. Nothing stimulating or complex.
visual_theme.camera: Extremely slow drift or nearly static. Barely perceptible movement. No cuts.
visual_theme.image_prompt_suffix: calming, sleep-inducing, soft gradient, night sky, minimal, peaceful, dark blue tones, 4k, ambient

ambient_audio.style: Very low, warm drone. Almost imperceptible. Gentle sine waves with slow modulation.
